wiki.summary: On “DIOR LEOPARD”, Che uses melodic flows, which sound very similar to his previous sound, before a transitions brings us to a more melodic track. On the first beat, which is produced by azure, we get a chaotic beat, with high synth melodies, bass-distorting the rest of the beat, with a fast-paced percussion. He also shouts out female artist k3, with whom Che was rumoured to be in a relationship with. The track then transitions to another beat, which is also produced by azure. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: On “DIOR LEOPARD”, Che uses melodic flows, which sound very similar to his previous sound, before a transitions brings us to a more melodic track. On the first beat, which is produced by azure, we get a chaotic beat, with high synth melodies, bass-distorting the rest of the beat, with a fast-paced percussion. He also shouts out female artist k3, with whom Che was rumoured to be in a relationship with. The track then transitions to another beat, which is also produced by azure. The track features an even more melodic beat. Che first starts this song with a monotone voice, but then transitions to a more melodic voice, when he starts singing on the track, he talks about topics like love, heartbreak, accusations of selling his soul and drugs. The track was first revealed to exist and be on REST IN BASS, after a FADER interview with Che was released on July 3rd, 2025. The track would officially release on Che’s sophomore album, REST IN BASS, on July 18, 2025. Read more on Last.fm.
